_note: SRD 5e combat rules in compact pseudocode form.
bonusActions: Offhand attack (if dual-wielding, dmg die only, no modifier)
Class features (e.g. Cunning Action, Second Wind)
attackFlow: 1. Roll d20 + ability mod + proficiency (if proficient)
2. Natural 20 = critical hit (double damage dice). Natural 1 = auto miss.
3. If total >= target AC, hit. Roll damage dice + ability mod.
4. Melee: usually STR mod. Finesse weapons: STR or DEX. Ranged: DEX mod.
5. Spells: use spellcasting ability mod for spell attacks.

conditions.blinded: Disadvantage on attacks, attacks against have advantage
conditions.charmed: Cannot attack charmer, charmer has advantage on social checks
conditions.frightened: Disadvantage on checks/attacks while source visible, cannot willingly move closer
conditions.grappled: Speed 0, ends if grappler incapacitated or effect moves target out of reach
conditions.invisible: Advantage on attacks, attacks against have disadvantage
conditions.paralyzed: Incapacitated, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage, hits within 5ft are crits
conditions.poisoned: Disadvantage on attacks and ability checks
conditions.prone: Disadvantage on attacks, melee attacks within 5ft have advantage, ranged have disadvantage
conditions.restrained: Speed 0, disadvantage on attacks and DEX saves, attacks against have advantage
conditions.stunned: Incapacitated, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage
conditions.unconscious: Incapacitated, prone, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage, hits within 5ft are crits

rest.short: 1+ hours. Spend hit dice to heal (roll hit die + CON mod per die).
rest.long: 8+ hours. Regain all HP. Regain up to half total hit dice (min 1). Reset spell slots.
